The initial temperature is `T_1 = 298 K`. 
The process is adiabatic. What is the work supplied per kilogram of gas? 

The gas is ideal, with `R = 287 {J}/{kg K}` and `c_v = 1010 {J}/{kg K}`." style="whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shape=label;align=left;spacingLeft=0;rounded=0;spacing=7;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry div.div:
A gas in a cylinder is compressed reversibly from to .
The initial temperature is .
The process is adiabatic. What is the work supplied per kilogram of gas?
The gas is ideal, with and .
